summary: Backend testing completed for new billing, batch processing, and webhook features. All 34 tests passed (100%). Tested: Plans API, Subscription management, Razorpay order creation & verification (test mode), Wallet top-up, Batch extraction (max 10 docs), Webhook CRUD & testing. SDKs reviewed - well structured with proper error handling.

minor.note: JWT secret key warning (30 bytes, below 32 recommended) - low priority security improvement

plans_api: GET /api/plans - returns all 4 plans (free, starter, growth, enterprise)
Plans have correct structure (id, name, price_inr, extractions_per_month, features)
Enterprise plan: custom pricing, unlimited extractions
subscription_api: GET /api/subscription - returns user's current plan and usage
Subscription shows proper usage structure (extractions_used, limit, remaining)
POST /api/subscription/create-order - creates Razorpay order for starter plan
POST /api/subscription/create-order - creates Razorpay order for growth plan
Create order rejects invalid plan with 400
POST /api/subscription/verify-payment - accepts test signature and activates plan
wallet_api: POST /api/wallet/topup - creates order for wallet top-up
batch_extraction_api: Batch extraction enforces max 10 documents limit
Batch extraction requires at least 1 image
Batch extraction requires API key authentication
webhooks_api: Create webhook with secret for HMAC signing
usage_limits: Free plan has 100 extraction limit verified
integration_flows: Full subscription upgrade flow: register -> check subscription -> create order -> verify payment -> check upgraded plan
Batch processing flow: register -> create API key -> batch extract 3 documents

critical_code_review_comments: Razorpay integration properly handles test mode - accepts any signature when IS_TEST_MODE=true
Webhook system properly excludes secret from list responses for security
Batch extraction correctly limits to 10 documents per request
Plans API correctly returns all 4 pricing tiers with proper structure
SDKs (Python & Node.js) are well-structured with proper error handling for 401, 402, 429 errors

test_credentials.note: Test users created with pattern TEST_billing_user_*, TEST_flow_user_*, TEST_batch_user_* during testing

seed_data_creation: Test users, API keys, webhooks, and payment orders created with TEST_* prefix during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend billing features fully tested. Razorpay is in TEST MODE - no real payments processed. All new endpoints working: /api/plans, /api/subscription, /api/subscription/create-order, /api/subscription/verify-payment, /api/wallet/topup, /api/v1/batch-extract, /api/webhooks CRUD + test. SDKs at /app/sdks/python and /app/sdks/nodejs are properly structured.

razorpay_integration.test_mode_behavior: Accepts any signature, returns mock order IDs (order_test_*)

sdk_review.python_sdk: Well-structured with ExtractAI client class, ExtractionResult/BatchResult dataclasses, proper error classes (AuthenticationError, RateLimitError, UsageLimitError)
sdk_review.nodejs_sdk: Well-structured with ExtractAI class, proper error handling, camelCase property mapping, batch support
